# StarBottles

> StarBottles is a B2B packaging distributor based in Thrissur, Kerala, India — supplying premium PET, HDPE, LDPE, PP, and glass packaging to cosmetic, personal care, pharma, and FMCG businesses across India since 1967. Low MOQ, custom branding, pan-India delivery. ISO certified, BIS compliant.

## Company

- [About StarBottles](https://starbottles.in/about): Company history, certifications, stats — 2200+ clients, 1500+ SKUs, 18+ states served.
- [Contact](https://starbottles.in/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and branch locations in Thrissur and Ernakulam, Kerala.

## Products

- [Product Catalogue](https://starbottles.in/products): Full listing of all packaging SKUs — filterable by category, material, and capacity.
- [Download Catalogues](https://starbottles.in/catalogue): Downloadable PDF product catalogues.

## Key Product Categories

- PET bottles (dropper, spray, lotion, serum, Boston round, pharmaceutical)
- HDPE bottles and jars (cosmetic, pharma, industrial)
- PP jars and containers (cream, powder, ointment)
- Airless pump bottles and dispensers
- Glass bottles and jars
- Caps, closures, and accessories

## Ordering & Enquiries

- Minimum order quantities (MOQ) are product-specific — contact for details.
- Custom branding (screen printing, labels, hot stamping) available on select SKUs.
- WhatsApp enquiries: https://wa.me/918086850000
- Email: mail@starbottles.in
